nameMeanings.name: Dennys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Philippa Dennys was born in 1365, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert Dennis and Lady Margaret Godolphin. She married William Drake in 1390, in Great Waltham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Dennys(은)는 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 Robert Dennis(와)과 Lady Margaret Godolphin의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1390년 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 William Drake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Drake в 1390 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в местности Англия, Великобритания.
